plugins.name: job-search-copilot
plugins.description: A conversational job-search copilot: optimize your LinkedIn profile, scout and rank fresh job postings, tailor your resume for ATS, map warm paths into target companies, and run a 10-post content engine.

plugins.name: user-persona-generator
plugins.description: Generate research-grade user personas for simulated UX testing: interview-based persona creation, browser-driving test sessions with live think-aloud, and severity-ranked findings reports.

plugins.name: interviewer-bot
plugins.description: An adaptive mock-interview coach: reads your resume and a job description, runs a realistic interview in the hiring company's voice, and hands you a private performance review with rewritten answers.
